text:
Created attachment 169619
pacemaker-1.1.14_1.diff

* Rename patches to fix portlint warnings
* Add patch to SysInfo RA to extract mem/cpu info for FreeBSD
* Add patch to Makefile.ams to disable installation of Linux init scripts
* Add dependency to net-mgmt/resource-agents for resource agent shell functions
